notes: Composition-pinning contract for the Math command-editor strip and the Elements panel (canvas/render-card excluded). It pins the real tree behind the inventory's 'shared multiline primitive compiled' claim and design 12.2: (1) editwindow.ui's scrolledwindow/editview ids and scroll-policy geometry that SmEditWindow binds by name; (2) the compiled multilineeditbox/Entire 3-state token set; (3) sidebarelements_math.ui's categorylist/elements/deletemenu ids and the IconView pixbuf/tooltip/single-click properties SmElementsPanel binds by name; (4) the closed, ordered 11-entry RID_CATEGORY_* list SmElementsControl::categories() returns, pinned by symbol identity + order (locale-safe, not translated text); (5) the single shared SmElementsControl class. IMPORTANT HONESTY CAVEAT: this does NOT assert Math's editor paints from the multilineeditbox tokens -- svx/source/dialog/weldeditview.cxx sources its background from rStyleSettings.GetFieldColor() and references no vcl::MaterialTokens/VCL_FILE_WIDGET_THEME guard, so marker (2) pins only that the compiled shared primitive is unchanged (matching the inventory's literal 'shared multiline primitive compiled' phrasing), not that Math's control consumes it. Source-composition evidence only; no build, no rendered editor/panel, no runtime interaction (runtime_verified:false throughout).

markers.role: SmEditWindow ctor binds the editwindow.ui scrolled window by name
SmEditWindow::CreateEditView welds the editview drawing area by name
SmElementsPanel binds categorylist/elements/deletemenu and constructs the shared control
the single SmElementsControl class defines categories() + its IconView/Menu ctor

shared_control_header.note: SmElementsControl is a single class (declared here, defined in ElementsDockingWindow.cxx) constructed only by SmElementsPanel; there is no forked second implementation.

category_list.role: the category combo is driven by the closed, ordered 11-entry RID_CATEGORY_* list, pinned by symbol identity + order so it stays locale-safe
